_note: To Hit data is the real ASL C3 TO HIT TABLE + C4 GUN & AMMO BASIC TO HIT NUMBER MODIFICATIONS, transcribed from the rules card (page after C27). To Kill (C7) is STILL PROVISIONAL placeholder data pending its table image. TH/TK numbers are the 2d6 total you must roll AT OR UNDER; higher = easier. C4 modifications are added to the basic To Hit number (positive = easier). The Hit Determination DRM is a die-roll modifier (positive = harder) and is subtracted from the To Hit number. Range-indexed rows are aligned left-to-right with `range_brackets`.

to_hit._note: Basic To Hit number by target type, split German (black column) vs Other (red column). Final TH# = basic[target][nationality_class][band] + weapon_type mod + ammo mod + size mods (<=57mm and <=40mm STACK) - Hit Determination DRM. A To Hit dr of 2 always hits; 12 always misses.

to_kill._note: PROVISIONAL placeholder — NOT the real C7 To Kill Table. Awaiting the C7 table image to transcribe like the C3 data above. Base TK# by caliber row (mm) x range bracket; Final TK# = base + ammo mod. Target Armor is NOT subtracted (no armor input) - the raw TK# is returned for the user to apply armor themselves (each armor point = -1). Smoke cannot kill. Caliber rows are thresholds: a weapon uses the largest row <= its mm.
